list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: implement deferred deep link automation framework with CI support
- Implement complete deferred deep link validation flow - Automate Chrome launch and deferred link navigation - Verify Play Store redirection before app installation - Add APK uninstall and reinstall workflow - Improve installer framework for Android and iOS - Add DeferredLinkPage using Page Object Model - Enhance reusable wait utilities and BasePage methods - Integrate Extent Reports with custom logging - Add TestNG listener for reporting - Add Jenkins pipeline support for CI/CD - Refactor framework for scalability and maintainability

task.summary:
feat: add initial Appium automation framework with deferred deep link flow
- Added Maven-based Appium framework - Configured DriverFactory with Android and iOS support - Added Appium server management - Implemented ConfigReader for configuration handling - Added BaseTest with TestNG lifecycle management - Implemented WaitUtils for explicit waits - Added CommandExecutor and DeviceManager utilities - Added AppInstaller with Android/iOS installer implementations - Implemented ChromePage and DeferredLinkPage - Added end-to-end deferred deep link test flow

- Added automatic Appium server startup and shutdown - Refactored DriverFactory for Android/iOS initialization - Improved BaseTest lifecycle management - Implemented Deferred Link test flow - Added DeferredLinkPage validations - Updated framework configuration - Updated Maven dependencies - Added latest test APK

feat: implement deferred deep link automation framework with CI support
- Implement complete deferred deep link validation flow - Automate Chrome launch and deferred link navigation - Verify Play Store redirection before app installation - Add APK uninstall and reinstall workflow - Improve installer framework for Android and iOS - Add DeferredLinkPage using Page Object Model - Enhance reusable wait utilities and BasePage methods - Integrate Extent Reports with custom logging - Add TestNG listener for reporting - Add Jenkins pipeline support for CI/CD - Refactor framework for scalability and maintainability

MESSAGE.value:
feat: add initial Appium automation framework with deferred deep link flow
- Added Maven-based Appium framework - Configured DriverFactory with Android and iOS support - Added Appium server management - Implemented ConfigReader for configuration handling - Added BaseTest with TestNG lifecycle management - Implemented WaitUtils for explicit waits - Added CommandExecutor and DeviceManager utilities - Added AppInstaller with Android/iOS installer implementations - Implemented ChromePage and DeferredLinkPage - Added end-to-end deferred deep link test flow

- Added automatic Appium server startup and shutdown - Refactored DriverFactory for Android/iOS initialization - Improved BaseTest lifecycle management - Implemented Deferred Link test flow - Added DeferredLinkPage validations - Updated framework configuration - Updated Maven dependencies - Added latest test APK

feat: implement deferred deep link automation framework with CI support
- Implement complete deferred deep link validation flow - Automate Chrome launch and deferred link navigation - Verify Play Store redirection before app installation - Add APK uninstall and reinstall workflow - Improve installer framework for Android and iOS - Add DeferredLinkPage using Page Object Model - Enhance reusable wait utilities and BasePage methods - Integrate Extent Reports with custom logging - Add TestNG listener for reporting - Add Jenkins pipeline support for CI/CD - Refactor framework for scalability and maintainability

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: implement deferred deep link automation framework with CI support
- Implement complete deferred deep link validation flow - Automate Chrome launch and deferred link navigation - Verify Play Store redirection before app installation - Add APK uninstall and reinstall workflow - Improve installer framework for Android and iOS - Add DeferredLinkPage using Page Object Model - Enhance reusable wait utilities and BasePage methods - Integrate Extent Reports with custom logging - Add TestNG listener for reporting - Add Jenkins pipeline support for CI/CD - Refactor framework for scalability and maintainability
